title: Hoplite for Lunar Client
description: Tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience on Hoplite through Lunar Client, including in-game proximity voice chat.
body:
![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/bb4999e152-hoplite-modpack.png) # Hoplite for Lunar Client **Hoplite for Lunar Client** is a tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience, including in-game proximity voice chat. These mods are validated to work with Lunar Client. _Note: While you're able to use **Hoplite for Lunar Client** on any modpack loader, it's heavily recommended to use it on [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download) to ensure you get the best experience on **Hoplite**._ ## Modpack Content * **Simple Voice Chat**: Proximity voice chat for Minecraft with a variety of features. * **Cloth Config API**: Configuration library for Minecraft Mods. * **Krypton**: Optimizes in the Minecraft network stack. Reduces memory and CPU usage. * **Mod Menu**: Adds a mod menu to view an in-game list of all the mods you have installed. * **More Culling**: Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve FPS. * **Memory Leak Fix**: Fixes random memory leaks found within vanilla Minecraft. * **Sodium Extra**: Adds features found in Optifine to Sodium, like particle and animation settings. * **Reese's Sodium Options**: Replaces Sodium's option screen to improve user experience. ## FAQ
What's Hoplite and where can I play it? Hoplite is a Minecraft server created and owned by [SpeedSilver](https://www.youtube.com/@SpeedSilver). Hoplite offers innovative new games such as Battle Royale and Duels. All of the gamemodes found on Hoplite, contain custom items referred to as "[Legendary Items](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client#section-How_to_get_the_Hoplite_Modpack)". These are unique custom model items, that have special abilities to create a unique combat experience. You can play Hoplite today @ [hoplite.gg](https://hoplite.gg/). Not sold yet? [Read more](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/why-lunar-client-is-the-best-for-playing-hoplite)!
How do I launch this on Lunar Client?
Simple! In three easy steps you can be ready to go!

### Step 1: Download Lunar Client [![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/edcac7cc5f-lunar-client-download-grid.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/download) ### Step 2: Open Lunar Client and Click the Hoplite Logo [![Launcher Hoplite Quickplay](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/c058e104f6-launcher-hoplite-quickplay.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client#section-How_to_get_the_Hoplite_Modpack) ### Step 3: Click "Launch Modpack" [![Launcher Hoplite Mod Prompt](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/92d7c77c60-launcher-hoplite-mod-prompt.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client#section-How_to_get_the_Hoplite_Modpack)

Connect and create one of a kind experiences and get the latest updates by joining our [Discord](https://lunarclient.com/discord) Community.
